title: Reconciliation
subtitle: Match bank transactions to your deals or liabilities.

rules.created: Rule memorized — future similar transactions will be classified automatically
rules.nothingToApply: No pending transaction matches a rule

bulk.confirmBodyCharge_one: {{count}} transaction will be marked as an expense.
bulk.confirmBodyCharge_other: {{count}} transactions will be marked as expenses.
bulk.confirmBodyTax_one: {{count}} transaction will be marked as a tax.
bulk.confirmBodyTax_other: {{count}} transactions will be marked as taxes.
bulk.confirmBodyProduct_one: {{count}} transaction will be marked as income.
bulk.confirmBodyProduct_other: {{count}} transactions will be marked as income.
bulk.confirmBodyInternalTransfer_one: {{count}} transaction will be marked as an internal transfer.
bulk.confirmBodyInternalTransfer_other: {{count}} transactions will be marked as internal transfers.

combobox.emptyEquity: No equity position for this organization.
combobox.emptyLoans: No current account for this organization.

errors.failed: The action failed. Please try again.
errors.not_categorized: VAT rates can only be set on transactions marked as expense or income.
errors.deal_wrong_org: This deal belongs to another organization.
errors.equity_wrong_org: This equity position belongs to another organization.
errors.loan_wrong_org: This transaction belongs to neither organization of the current account.
errors.already_matched_to_deal: This transaction is already matched to a deal. Unmatch it first.
errors.allocated_to_liability: This transaction is allocated to a liability (equity or current account). Detach it from the Liabilities page first.
